ljdkj] jk"Vªh; jktekxZ ’kqYd ¼njksa dk vo/kkj.k ,oa laxzg.k½ fu;e] 2008 ds fu;e 3 ds lkFk ifBr jk"Vªh; jktekxZ vf/kfu;e] 1956 ¼1956 dk 48½ dh /kkjk 7 }kjk iznRr ’kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs gq,] ,rn~}kjk vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 682¼v½] rkjh[k 13 ekpZ] 2013 dks fujLr djrh gS A [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@lhvks@11&12@’kkgtgkaiqj iqy] vyds’k ’kekZ] la;qqDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th December, 2014 S.O. 3075 (E).— in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highway Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) read with Rule 3 of the National Highway Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government by notification number S.O. 682(E), dated 13th March, 2013 of the Government of India has authorized National Highways Authority of India (the “Authority”) to levy and collect fee on mechanical vehicles for the use of Shahjahanpur Bridge [Garrah river bridge] at km. 325.00 on NH-24 in the State of UP. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection ) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification number S.O. 682(E), dated 13th March, 2013. [F. No. NHAI/ 13013/ CO/11-12/ Shahjahnpur Bridge] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. 4808 GI/2014 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
